data.acceptance:
1. `.github/workflows/ci.yml` runs on `push` and `pull_request`.
2. Steps: `actions/checkout@v4`, `actions/setup-go@v5` with `go-version-file`, `go vet ./...`, `go test ./...` (race + coverage flags).
3. Workflow runs on Ubuntu and macOS at least.
4. Branch protection on `main` requires this workflow to pass.
